description: Remote/L1 E2E CLI agent matrix. L1 treats qoder-cli as the CLI identity; qoder is reserved for IDE-side coverage. npmPackage is used by E2E_SCENARIO=version-matrix. Cursor has platform-specific install/skip behavior. Qwen/OpenCode default probes are best-effort and can be overridden with E2E_QWEN_PROBE_CMD / E2E_OPENCODE_PROBE_CMD.

agents.name: Codex CLI
agents.notes: OpenAI Codex CLI; hooks from loongsuite-pilot installer. Ensure command is built in agent-matrix.mjs from E2E_CODEX_NPM_SPEC (default @openai/codex). E2E_CODEX_FORCE_ENSURE=1 reinstalls even if codex exists. Config: E2E_WRITE_REMOTE_CODEX_CONFIG=1 + E2E_CODEX_OPENAI_API_KEY; run-remote-e2e writes ~/.codex/config.toml then runs ensure then probe.
agents.ensureInstallSh: npm install -g @openai/codex || echo '[e2e-ensure] npm install @openai/codex failed'
agents.defaultProbeSh: command -v codex >/dev/null && codex exec "你好" --skip-git-repo-check < /dev/null || true
agents.installHint: Use E2E_USE_MATRIX_PROBE=1; codex exec must use < /dev/null.

agents.name: Claude Code
agents.ensureInstallSh: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code || echo '[e2e-ensure] npm install claude-code failed'
agents.installHint: Headless: E2E_WRITE_REMOTE_CLAUDE_ONBOARDING_SKIP=1 + E2E_CLAUDE_BAILIAN=1 + E2E_CLAUDE_BAILIAN_API_KEY (…/apps/anthropic). Optional: E2E_WRITE_REMOTE_CLAUDE_PROXY_CONFIG + E2E_CLAUDE_PROXY_API_KEY for claude-code-proxy. Legacy: E2E_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

agents.name: Cursor CLI
agents.notes: Default ensure: official cursor.com/install (Agent CLI). E2E_CURSOR_INSTALL_STRATEGY=watzon for watzon AppImage extract. Probe runs --version on AppImage / PATH cursor / cursor-agent / agent; if the binary fails with GLIBC_/not found, it emits '[e2e-probe] cursor skipped: host glibc too old' and exits 0 when E2E_CURSOR_SKIP_IF_INCOMPAT=1 (default), or exit 78 when =0.
agents.defaultProbeSh:
set +e
_SKIP="${_E2E_CURSOR_SKIP_IF_INCOMPAT:-1}"
_FAIL_CODE=78
_BIN=""
for _c in cursor cursor-agent agent; do
  if command -v "$_c" >/dev/null 2>&1; then _BIN="$(command -v "$_c")"; break; fi
done
[ -z "$_BIN" ] && { echo "[e2e-probe] no cursor/agent on PATH"; exit 0; }
_out=$("$_BIN" --version </dev/null 2>&1); _rc=$?
if [ "$_rc" -ne 0 ]; then
  case "$_out" in *GLIBC_*|*"not found"*|*"cannot execute"*) echo "[e2e-probe] cursor skipped: host glibc too old"; [ "$_SKIP" = "1" ] && exit 0 || exit $_FAIL_CODE;; esac
  echo "[e2e-probe] cursor --version failed: $_out"; [ "$_SKIP" = "1" ] && exit 0 || exit $_FAIL_CODE
fi
echo "[e2e-probe] cursor version: $_out"
if [ -z "${CURSOR_API_KEY:-}" ]; then
  echo "[e2e-probe] CURSOR_API_KEY unset — skipping conversation probe"
  exit 0
fi
echo "[e2e-probe] cursor conversation probe:"
"$_BIN" -p "你好" --trust </dev/null || true
agents.installHint: Default: official Agent installer (cursor.com/install). Full IDE AppImage: E2E_CURSOR_INSTALL_STRATEGY=watzon or E2E_CURSOR_ENSURE_INSTALL_SH. On old-glibc hosts, ensure/probe auto-skip with E2E_CURSOR_SKIP_IF_INCOMPAT=1 (default) or fail loudly with =0.

agents.name: Qoder CLI
agents.notes: L1 CLI identity is qoder-cli. Hook input watches ~/.loongsuite-pilot/logs/qoder/history and qoder-cli-session reads ~/.qoder/logs/sessions. Print probe uses qodercli/qoder (needs E2E_QODER_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN).
agents.ensureInstallSh: npm install -g @qoder-ai/qodercli && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && ( command -v qoder >/dev/null || ( command -v qodercli >/dev/null && ln -sf "$(command -v qodercli)" "$HOME/.local/bin/qoder" ) ) || echo '[e2e-ensure] qoder npm/symlink failed'
agents.defaultProbeSh:
Q="$(command -v qodercli 2>/dev/null || command -v qoder 2>/dev/null)"
[ -z "$Q" ] && exit 0
mkdir -p "$HOME/.qoder"
if [ -z "${QODER_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
  echo "[e2e-probe] QODER_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN unset — set E2E_QODER_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN on local env to inject for qodercli"
  exit 0
fi
_VER_RAW="$("$Q" --version 2>&1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | head -1)"
_MAJ="${_VER_RAW%%.*}"
_REST="${_VER_RAW#*.}"
_MIN="${_REST%%.*}"
_PATCH="${_REST##*.}"
_IS_NEW=0
if [ "${_MAJ:-0}" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then _IS_NEW=1
elif [ "${_MAJ:-0}" = "0" ] && [ "${_MIN:-0}" -gt 2 ] 2>/dev/null; then _IS_NEW=1
elif [ "${_MAJ:-0}" = "0" ] && [ "${_MIN:-0}" = "2" ] && [ "${_PATCH:-0}" -ge 12 ] 2>/dev/null; then _IS_NEW=1
fi
if [ "$_IS_NEW" = "1" ]; then
  "$Q" --print --yolo --cwd "$HOME" "你好" </dev/null || true
else
  "$Q" -p "你好" --max-turns 1 --yolo -w "$HOME" </dev/null || true
fi
agents.installHint: Logstore needs a real model turn. Use PAT via E2E_QODER_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

agents.name: Qwen Code CLI
agents.notes: Hook integration via ~/.qwen/settings.json. Default package can be overridden with E2E_QWEN_NPM_SPEC. Conversation probe can be overridden with E2E_QWEN_PROBE_CMD.
agents.ensureInstallSh: npm install -g "${E2E_QWEN_NPM_SPEC:-@qwen-code/qwen-code}" || echo '[e2e-ensure] npm install qwen-code-cli failed; set E2E_QWEN_NPM_SPEC or E2E_EXTRA_ENSURE_BASH'
agents.defaultProbeSh:
set +e
if ! command -v qwen >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[e2e-probe] qwen missing'; exit 0; fi
qwen --version </dev/null || true
if [ -n "${E2E_QWEN_PROBE_CMD:-}" ]; then echo '[e2e-probe] qwen custom probe'; eval "$E2E_QWEN_PROBE_CMD" || true; exit 0; fi
_KEY="${QWEN_API_KEY:-${DASHSCOPE_API_KEY:-${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}}}"
_BASE="${QWEN_BASE_URL:-${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1}}"
_MODEL="${E2E_QWEN_MODEL:-qwen3-coder-plus}"
if [ -z "$_KEY" ]; then echo '[e2e-probe] QWEN_API_KEY/DASHSCOPE_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY unset — skipping qwen conversation probe'; exit 0; fi
export OPENAI_API_KEY="$_KEY"; qwen --auth-type openai --openai-api-key "$_KEY" --openai-base-url "$_BASE" -m "$_MODEL" -p "你好" </dev/null || true
agents.installHint: Set E2E_QWEN_API_KEY or E2E_DASHSCOPE_API_KEY for a real model turn; override command with E2E_QWEN_PROBE_CMD if this CLI version uses different flags.

agents.name: OpenCode
agents.notes: Plugin-inject integration. Default package can be overridden with E2E_OPENCODE_NPM_SPEC. Conversation probe can be overridden with E2E_OPENCODE_PROBE_CMD.
agents.ensureInstallSh: npm install -g "${E2E_OPENCODE_NPM_SPEC:-opencode-ai}" || echo '[e2e-ensure] npm install opencode failed; set E2E_OPENCODE_NPM_SPEC or E2E_EXTRA_ENSURE_BASH'
agents.defaultProbeSh:
set +e
if ! command -v opencode >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[e2e-probe] opencode missing'; exit 0; fi
opencode --version </dev/null || true
if [ -n "${E2E_OPENCODE_PROBE_CMD:-}" ]; then echo '[e2e-probe] opencode custom probe'; eval "$E2E_OPENCODE_PROBE_CMD" || true; exit 0; fi
if [ -z "${OPENCODE_API_KEY:-}" ]; then echo '[e2e-probe] OPENCODE_API_KEY unset — skipping opencode conversation probe (set E2E_OPENCODE_API_KEY; do NOT reuse the 百炼 key)'; exit 0; fi
# Prevent the globally-injected 百炼 ANTHROPIC_* (for Claude Code) from hijacking OpenCode's provider.
unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL ANTHROPIC_MODEL
if [ -n "${E2E_OPENCODE_MODEL:-}" ]; then opencode run -m "$E2E_OPENCODE_MODEL" "你好" </dev/null || opencode run "你好" </dev/null || true; else opencode run "你好" </dev/null || opencode "你好" </dev/null || true; fi
agents.installHint: OpenCode uses an OpenCode Zen key (E2E_OPENCODE_API_KEY, from opencode.ai/workspace; NOT the 百炼/Dashscope key). Zen resolves its gateway endpoint from models.dev — no base URL needed. Model = opencode/<model> via E2E_OPENCODE_MODEL (default opencode/big-pickle, free). Override the whole command with E2E_OPENCODE_PROBE_CMD if the installed OpenCode version differs.
